reasoning: Button uses parchment-gold base (warm, light), sky-blue dashed ring (saturated, bright), candy-pink center icon, and warm-tan/brown ornamental corners — all direct matches to the Echoes-tuned palette swatches. Dark accents in the frame are warm-brown/dark-teal, not pure black or grey. Overall mood is warm and bright; no cold corporate blues, no muddy desaturated areas, no near-black shadows. Internal harmony is strong: the parchment base anchors the warm-mid-value requirement, sky-blue ring provides complementary contrast without going cold, and the pink center adds the candy warmth. Minor note: parchment saturation is intentionally low as a base tone which is acceptable for readability. Palette compatibility is high across all three states shown.
